meaning: n.对一事热狂的人,偏执狂者
examples: The monomaniac is unbalanced in just one area on everything else except his own pet and particular delusion he may be completely normal.
A few more meetings completely removed from Narendra's mind the last traces of the notion that Sri Ramakrishna might be a monomaniac or wily hypnotist.
An admitted monomaniac on the subject of parking tickets, he races through calculations.
She's something of a monomaniac, but she's right.
